headlines.title: How bizarre fish ‘experiment’ videos from China hijacked the internet’s worst impulses
headlines.description: Of the hundreds of “LabGerm” videos posted and reposted to social media in recent weeks, most start out the same way: A pair of gloved hands appears against a white backdrop as an AI-generated voice narrates and upbeat music plays in the background

headlines.title: Pope Leo will take on AI alongside an Anthropic co-founder
headlines.description: Pope Leo XIV is set to release a landmark encyclical Monday focused on preserving human dignity in the face of AI

headlines.title: Lupita Nyong’o shrugs off racist ‘Odyssey’ backlash over Helen of Troy casting
headlines.description: Oscar winner Lupita Nyong’o said she’s losing no sleep over racist criticism of her casting as Helen of Troy, the mythic beauty whose face “launched a thousand ships” and ignited the Trojan War

headlines.title: Trump abruptly scraps signing of landmark executive order regulating AI
headlines.description: President Donald Trump scrapped an executive order signing Thursday. The order is expected to lay out partnerships with leading AI companies to vet new models.

headlines.title: Patrick Stewart, AI and I encountered the Bard. Resistance was futile.
headlines.description: My journey through Shakespeare was guided by “Star Trek” star Patrick Stewart, who just recorded a new audiobook of the sonnets, and Claude AI.

headlines.title: Trump says agreement on Iran war ‘largely negotiated’
headlines.description: Officials from the U.S. and Iran appear to be nearing a deal to end the ongoing Middle-East conflict, according to public statements from President Donald Trump Saturday. “An Agreement has been largely negotiated, subject to finalization between the United States of America, the Islamic Republic of Iran, and the various other Countries, as listed,” Trump wrote in a Truth Social post Saturday afternoon. NBC News' Raf Sanchez reports.

headlines.title: Secret Service Takes Down Gunman Near White House
headlines.description: The Secret Service shot and killed an armed suspect who opened fire at a security checkpoint outside the White House. The 21-year-old suspect was known to police and Secret Service with a history of mental health concerns, according to multiple senior law enforcement officials. A second person, who authorities believe to be a bystander, was injured in the shooting and that person’s condition is unclear. NBC’s Julie Tsirkin reports for Sunday TODAY.

headlines.title: State of emergency declared over southern California chemical incident
headlines.description: Gov. Gavin Newsom (D-CA) declared a state of emergency in California on Saturday as thousands of people were forced to evacuate their homes over a toxic chemical tank that, authorities say, will either leak or explode. NBC News' Steve Patterson is on the ground just outside the evacuation zone.

headlines.title: Massie says he’ll ‘stay engaged’ after primary loss, won’t rule out 2028 run
headlines.description: Rep. Thomas Massie (R-Ky.) tells Meet the Press he “won't rule anything out” as he’s asked about his political future after losing his primary to a Trump-backed challenger.

headlines.title: Robotic exoskeletons promise easier hikes and high-tech workouts
headlines.description: Wearable exoskeletons promise to boost endurance on hikes and workouts. NBC News' Ryan Chandler explores whether the high-tech gear is the future of fitness - or just a fad.

headlines.title: How 'Age Tech' might help you grow old at home and with more ease
headlines.description: It can be hard for older adults to live independently if they don’t have a caregiver or anyone close by to help them out. Now, there’s technology that can help older adults broaden their options, make their homes safer and ease caregivers’ minds.

headlines.title: Shop These Discounts on Everything You Need for Fun in the Sun
headlines.description: From fashion staples to beauty launches, Shop TODAY lifestyle and fashion contributor Chassie Post stops by Studio 1A to share a hotlist of the best discounted products to kick off your Memorial Day weekend. Products include Old Navy foldover pants, a Lands’ End polo dress, the Nori press iron, and more!
